Description : Meeting Agenda
1. **Introduction (2 minutes)**
   - Greet the client and briefly outline the meeting purpose.
2. **Client Information Update (5 minutes)**
   - Confirm full name, address, marital status, and ITIN number.
3. **Income Details (10 minutes)**
   - Discuss sources of income.
   - Ensure all necessary documentation (W-2, 1099, etc.) is received.
4. **Deductions and Credits (10 minutes)**
   - Identify deductible expenses.
   - Discuss eligibility for any tax credits.
5. **Special Situations (5 minutes)**
   - Review any significant events during the year.
   - Address any pending IRS issues.
6. **ITIN Renewal (5 minutes)**
   - Confirm required documentation for ITIN renewal.
   - Note the expiration date of the current ITIN.
7. **Q&A and Additional Notes (3 minutes)**
   - Answer any client questions.
   - Take note of any additional details or comments.
8. **Conclusion (2 minutes)**
   - Summarize the key points discussed.
   - Outline the next steps and follow-up actions.
Total Time: 40 minutes
This agenda will help keep the meeting focused and ensure that all important topics are covered.
